m=#o return R(K)end,function(W,y)local R=r(y)local I=function(I,l,o)return m(W,{I,l,o},y,R)end return I end,{},function(W,y)local R=r(y)local I=function(I,l)return m(W,{I,l},y,R)end return I end,155027+-155027,function(W,y)local R=r(y)local I=function(I)return m(W,{I},y,R)end return I end,function(W,y)local R=r(y)local I=function(...)return m(W,{...},y,R)end return I end,function(W,y)local R=r(y)local I=function(I,l,o,s,K)return m(W,{I;l,o,s,K},y,R)end return I end return(E(1477689-977032,{}))(R(K))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[y(-245884+263319)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
